    assert torch.isfinite(out).all(), f"{method_name} produced non-finite values"
    # OKLab deltas for reasonable inputs should stay bounded
    assert out.abs().max() < 1.0, f"{method_name} delta too large: max={out.abs().max().item()}"
def test_bilateral_constant_delta_textured_guide():
    """A constant delta must round-trip to itself regardless of guide texture.
    This test failed silently under the original nearest-corner guide sampling
    bug — would have caught Task 7 C1 at review time.
    """
    torch.manual_seed(42)
    delta = torch.full((1, 3, 36, 64), 0.1, device="cuda", dtype=torch.float32)
    # Highly textured orig_full — high-frequency noise
    orig = torch.rand(1, 3, 72, 128, device="cuda", dtype=torch.float32)
    full_size = (72, 128)

    for name in ("joint_bilateral", "asymmetric_bilateral"):
        out = REGISTRY[name](delta, orig, full_size)
        err = (out - 0.1).abs().max().item()
        assert err < 1e-5, f"{name} failed constant-delta + textured-guide: max err {err:.2e}"
